# Episodic Index

Entries are ordered newest first.

- 2026-07-15: [Governed MCP Lifecycle and Production Composition](meditation-2026-07-15-governed-mcp-lifecycle.md), covering the pushed governed MCP adapter lifecycle, the shipped local contract, the selected next implementation decisions, and the open external gates.
- 2026-07-14: [Governed MCP Gateway Foundation](meditation-2026-07-14-governed-mcp-gateway.md), covering the local MCP gateway contract, SDK compatibility, dedicated Entra resource application, internal-gateway IaC, and the pending tenant-consent and Fabric-fixture gates.
- 2026-07-14: [Runtime Reliability, Deployment, and Documentation Truth](meditation-2026-07-14-runtime-deployment-and-documentation.md), covering no-auth connector lifecycle repair, Azure OpenAI/LiteLLM hardening, client-state reconciliation, image-only deployment recovery, production smoke validation, Agency tooling synchronization, and source-versus-runtime documentation discipline.
- 2026-07-10: [Azure SQL Delegated Authentication](meditation-2026-07-10-azure-sql-delegated-auth.md), covering the separate connector boundary, hosted anonymous popup flow, governed Entra registration, secretless managed-identity federation, deployment, and pending admin consent.
- 2026-07-09: [Azure Production Hardening and Stability Audit](meditation-2026-07-09-azure-production-hardening.md), covering the Azure production deployment, LLM stability incidents, packaging fixes, audit results, and remaining release work.
